title: Is vibe design system mandatory for app submission?
excerpt:

I am trying to create my first app for the marketplace. I am not using react for my project.

posts.author: soumya (Soumya Sahu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I am trying to create my first app for the marketplace. I am not using react for my project.

Is it mandatory to use vibe design system for submitting an app?

I want to use custom design but trying to keep it in similar to the vibe design guidelines. Like the font, colors, headings, text and other things as much as possible. Is this acceptable ?

Thanks

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: The vibe design system is recommended but not mandatory.

posts.author: Troikesse (ased)
posts.cookedHtml: I had the same question before submitting my app. You don’t have to use Vibe, but sticking to it helps keep things consistent with the rest of monday.com. I used parts of it while still customizing some components. For anyone building apps or websites and looking for design help, I found some useful stuff over at https://duckwebdesign.com/ too, especially around layout ideas and simple UI practices.
